name: Karl Nell
summary: Retired U.S. Army colonel, aerospace executive, and public advocate for greater government disclosure concerning UAP.

relationships.context: Served in an Army role supporting the UAP Task Force and related congressional engagement.
Delivered the SALT presentation on controlled UAP disclosure.
Participated in the Sol Foundation inaugural symposium.
Authored a Sol Foundation disclosure paper and participated in Sol symposium programming.

profileStatus: Former military officer and public disclosure advocate
profileSummary: Retired U.S. Army colonel, aerospace executive, and public advocate for greater government disclosure concerning UAP.
background: Retired U.S. Army colonel and aerospace executive.
inclusionNote: Included because of his former military and national-security background, public statements concerning UAP disclosure, and direct relevance to claims and people already represented in the knowledge graph.

referenceSources.label: The UFO Enigma: A Call for U.S. Government Disclosure
